# canMakeTextSmaller

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made smaller.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var canMakeTextSmaller: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if able to make the text smaller; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Changing the Text Size

- **canMakeTextLarger**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made larger.
- **makeTextLarger(_:)**: Action method that increases the text size by one unit.
- **makeTextSmaller(_:)**: Action method that reduces the text size by one unit.
